sentences.target: Das ist dieselbe Jacke wie gestern.

translations.de: Das ist dieselbe Jacke wie gestern.
translations.en: That's the same jacket as yesterday.
translations.es: Es la misma chaqueta que ayer.
translations.it: È la stessa giacca di ieri.
translations.zh-Hans: 这件夹克跟昨天那件是同一件。
translations.yue: 你今日著嘅褸同尋日嗰件係同一件。
translations.ru: Это та же куртка, что и вчера.
translations.pt: É a mesma jaqueta de ontem.
translations.vi: Đó là cùng một chiếc áo khoác như hôm qua.
translations.ar: إنها نفس السترة التي كنت ترتديها أمس.
translations.nl: Dat is dezelfde jas als gisteren.
translations.uk: Це та сама куртка, що й учора.
translations.hi: यह वही जैकेट है जो तुमने कल पहनी थी.
translations.pl: To ta sama kurtka co wczoraj.
translations.el: Είναι το ίδιο μπουφάν με χτες.
translations.nb: Det er den samme jakken som i går.
translations.id: Itu jaket yang sama seperti kemarin.
translations.sv: Det är samma jacka som i går.
translations.cs: To je ta stejná bunda jako včera.
translations.da: Det er den samme jakke som i går.
translations.fi: Se on sama takki kuin eilen.
translations.ja: 昨日と同じジャケットだね。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun functioning as subject; nominative singular neuter; deictic reference to an entity being identified.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person singular present indicative linking the subject to the predicate nominal.
Attributive determiner meaning ‘the same’; feminine nominative singular agreeing with ‘Jacke’ in a predicate nominative.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; predicate nominal after a copula.
Comparative subordinator introducing the comparison ‘wie gestern’ (‘as yesterday’).
Temporal adverb serving as the comparator in the elliptical comparative phrase.

sentences.target: Wir nehmen dieselbe Bahn zum Büro.

translations.de: Wir nehmen dieselbe Bahn zum Büro.
translations.en: We're taking the same train to the office.
translations.es: Vamos en el mismo tren a la oficina.
translations.fr: On prend le même train pour aller au bureau.
translations.it: Prendiamo lo stesso treno per andare in ufficio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们坐同一班火车去公司。
translations.yue: 我哋搭同一班火車去公司。
translations.ru: Мы едем в офис на одном и том же поезде.
translations.pt: Vamos no mesmo trem para o escritório.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đi cùng chuyến tàu đến văn phòng.
translations.nl: We nemen dezelfde trein naar kantoor.
translations.uk: Ми їдемо до офісу тим самим потягом.
translations.hu: Ugyanazzal a vonattal megyünk az irodába.
translations.hi: हम ऑफिस एक ही ट्रेन से जा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Jedziemy do biura tym samym pociągiem.
translations.el: Πάμε στο γραφείο με το ίδιο τρένο.
translations.nb: Vi tar samme tog til kontoret.
translations.id: Kami naik kereta yang sama ke kantor.
translations.sv: Vi tar samma tåg till jobbet.
translations.ro: Mergem la birou cu același tren.
translations.da: Vi tager det samme tog til kontoret.
translations.ja: 会社には同じ電車で行くよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb; 1st person plural present indicative describing the action.
Attributive determiner meaning ‘the same’; feminine accusative singular agreeing with ‘Bahn’, the direct object.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object of ‘nehmen’.
Contraction of the preposition ‘zu’ and the definite article ‘dem’; governs the dative and marks a goal/destination.
Common noun; neuter dative singular as the object of the preposition ‘zu(m)’ indicating destination.

sentences.target: Er trägt dieselbe Tasche jeden Tag.

translations.de: Er trägt dieselbe Tasche jeden Tag.
translations.en: He uses the same bag every day.
translations.es: Usa el mismo bolso todos los días.
translations.fr: Il utilise le même sac tous les jours.
translations.it: Usa la stessa borsa ogni giorno.
translations.ko: 그는 매일 같은 가방을 들고 다닌다.
translations.ru: Он каждый день ходит с одной и той же сумкой.
translations.pt: Ele usa a mesma bolsa todos os dias.
translations.he: הוא משתמש באותו תיק כל יום.
translations.vi: Ngày nào anh ấy cũng dùng cùng một cái túi.
translations.ar: هو يستخدم החقيبة نفسها كل يوم.
translations.nl: Hij gebruikt elke dag dezelfde tas.
translations.uk: Він щодня користується однією й тією самою сумкою.
translations.hu: Minden nap ugyanazt a táskát használja.
translations.hi: वह हर दिन वही बैग इस्तेमाल करता है.
translations.el: Χρησιμοποιεί την ίδια τσάντα κάθε μέρα.
translations.nb: Han bruker den samme vesken hver dag.
translations.id: Dia memakai tas yang sama setiap hari.
translations.sv: Han använder samma väska varje dag.
translations.ro: Folosește aceeași geantă în fiecare zi.
translations.da: Han bruger den samme taske hver dag.
translations.fi: Hän käyttää samaa laukkua joka päivä.
translations.ja: 彼は毎日同じバッグを使っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 3rd person singular masculine nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present indicative.
Attributive determiner meaning ‘the same’; feminine accusative singular agreeing with ‘Tasche’, the direct object.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object of ‘trägt’.
Attributive determiner; masculine accusative singular modifying ‘Tag’; forms an adverbial accusative of time (‘every day’).
Common noun; masculine accusative singular within the fixed temporal expression ‘jeden Tag’, functioning adverbially.

translations.en: I'm ordering the same soup again.
translations.es: Voy a pedir la misma sopa otra vez.
translations.it: Prendo di nuovo la stessa zuppa.
translations.ru: Я снова закажу тот же суп.
translations.pt: Vou pedir a mesma sopa de novo.
translations.he: אני מזמין את אותו מרק שוב.
translations.vi: Tôi lại gọi cùng món súp đó.
translations.uk: Я знову замовляю той самий суп.
translations.hi: मैं फिर से वही सूप ऑर्डर कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg bestiller den samme suppen igjen.
translations.id: Saya pesan sup yang sama lagi.
translations.da: Jeg bestiller den samme suppe igen.
translations.ja: また同じスープを頼みます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb; 1st person singular present indicative; non-separable be- prefix.
Attributive determiner meaning ‘the same’; feminine accusative singular agreeing with ‘Suppe’, the direct object.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object of ‘bestelle’.
Adverb of repetition/frequency modifying the verb phrase.
